'''''Nebula Queen''''' was a cruise liner owned by [[Event Vistas]].

The liner was one of the newest and most beautiful ships in the Event Vistas fleet in [[7 ABY/Legends|7 ABY]]. It made regular runs to [[Coruscant/Legends|Coruscant]]. [[Warlord/Legends|Warlord]] [[Zsinj]]'s [[Project Funeral]] kidnapped and brainwashed her [[Sullustan/Legends|Sullustan]] captain, [[Rostat Manr]], and ordered him to crash the ship into Coruscant's surface.

[[New Republic Intelligence Service|New Republic Intelligence]] placed an operative on the liner, who ordered one of Manr's subordinates, [[Nurm]], to stop him. The liner then made an uneventful landing on the [[Planet/Legends|planet]].

==Appearances==
*''[[X-Wing: Solo Command]]'' {{Ab|X-Wing: Solo Command (unabridged audiobook)}}
